name: instagram
description: A local-first Instagram content system for hooks, captions, content structure, and draft storage. Acts as The Attention Sculptor to optimize stop-rate and retention. No API connection, no auto-posting, no automation.
author: agenticio

capabilities.content_optimization_mode: Improves individual hooks, captions, and post structure for stop-rate and retention.
capabilities.account_strategy_mode: Designs account-level funnel logic, content pillars, and identity consistency.
capabilities.local_draft_persistence: Saves finalized caption drafts locally when the user requests persistence.
capabilities.funnel_diagnosis: Determines whether content serves awareness, trust, lead generation, or conversion support.
capabilities.friction_check: Identifies spam-like, unnatural, or over-optimized patterns and softens them.
